## Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 28, 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how **Gravity Maze** handles information when you use the game.

### Information we collect

Gravity Maze is designed to work without creating an account. The game does not intentionally collect names, email addresses, contacts, photos, or precise location data.

### Automatically generated data

Depending on the platform or store where you download the game, basic technical information may be processed by that platform, such as:

- device type and operating system;
- crash reports and diagnostics;
- download, installation, or purchase records managed by the store.

Curly Brackets uses this information only when it is made available by the platform and only to improve stability, compatibility, and support.

### Third-party services

Gravity Maze may be distributed through third-party stores or hosting providers. Their privacy practices are governed by their own policies.

### Children

Gravity Maze does not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, please contact us so we can review and delete it where required.

### Changes

This policy may be updated from time to time. The latest version will be posted on this page.

### Contact

For privacy questions, contact Curly Brackets through the support channel listed on the download page or store listing.
